title: [TaCZ] Endless Ammo Refabricated
description: A comprehensive ammo library addon for TACZ that adds 36 realistic ammunition types to expand your arsenal.
body:
## ammo library addon for [TaCZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero) that adds 36 realistic ammunition types.

### Pistol Calibers:
- .22 LR, .32 ACP, .380 Auto, 9x18mm, 9x21mm
- .357 SIG, .40 S&W, 10mm Auto
- .44 Special, .44 Magnum, .454 Casull, .500 S&W
- 7.5 FK
### Rifle Calibers:
- .17 HMR, .22 Hornet, .223 Remington
- .300 Blackout, .300 Win Mag
- 5.45x39mm, 5.56x30mm, 6.02x41mm
- 6.5 Creedmoor, 6.8 TVCM
- .366 TKM, 7.92x33mm Kurz, 7.92x57mm Mauser
9x39mm, 12.7x55mm
- .408 CheyTac, .416 Barrett
- .50 Beowulf, .458 SOCOM, .458 HAMR
### Shotgun Gauges:
- 4 Gauge, 20 Gauge, .410 Bore

### Requirements:
- Minecraft 1.21.1
- Fabric Loader 0.17.0+
- [TaCZ: Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/tacz-refabricated)

### License & Credits
This mod was developed with permission from Barquito and is based on [[TaCZ] Endless Ammo](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tacz-endless-ammo).

Please refrain from contacting or directing any questions to Barquito under any circumstances.
